caption: A man is seated in a studio with a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall behind him. He is wearing a black hooded sweatshirt over a grey shirt and has large black headphones over his ears. Positioned directly in front of his face is a professional studio microphone on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man expresses amusement; he begins by looking slightly upward and to the side with a soft smile. He then closes his eyes and tilts his head back slightly, laughing. His expression shifts back to a smile as he looks toward the side again, before returning to a closed-eye, laughing expression. His facial movements are the only significant changes across the scene, while the equipment and background remain static.
